blocks.content: Vincent grabbed Shirone's shoulders and shouted.

blocks.speaker: Vincent
blocks.content: Shirone! Why did you agree to this? This is really dangerous! No, it's my fault!

blocks.speaker: Vincent
blocks.content: This ignorant father of yours didn't know any better! So let's refuse!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's okay, Dad. As long as I don't leak anything, right?

blocks.speaker: Vincent
blocks.content: It's not that simple. How can anything humans do stay completely secret? No matter how I think about it, this is madness! I'll take responsibility and refuse!
Shirone smiled faintly and slowly shook his head.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I really have the best parents.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Father, thank you.
Vincent's face went blank.
It was the first time Shirone had ever addressed him so formally.
But what surprised him even more was the fact that Shirone was shedding tears.

blocks.speaker: Vincent
blocks.content: Shi, Shirone…
Shirone spread his arms wide.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Father, you've given me the greatest gift in the world.
Vincent forgot all about dignity and burst into tears.

blocks.speaker: Vincent
blocks.content: Had he ever seen his son cry before? No, had he ever seen such an expression of pure joy on his face?

blocks.speaker: Vincent
blocks.content: Don't worry, Shirone! No matter what happens, your father will protect you! You just focus on doing your best! I'll definitely protect you!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Dad, I'll do my best.

blocks.speaker: Vincent
blocks.content: That's right, my son! My treasure!
Vincent hugged Shirone and kissed his cheek.
Moved by the father and son's emotional embrace, their mother, Olina, wiped away happy tears.
A week later.
The common servants of the Ozent family came to take Shirone away.
Though it would take over two years to organize ten thousand books, Shirone, who had lived modestly, had only a single backpack of belongings.
Temuran had promised Shirone 20 gold coins per month as a condition for taking him.
Since a family's monthly living expenses were 4 gold coins, this was an enormous sum.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Will this house be a little more luxurious when I return?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Though he knew his parents weren't the type, Shirone forced himself to imagine a happy future to shake off his reluctance.
The moment he boarded the carriage, the contract took effect.
The common servants swiftly carried out the procedures, and Vincent, dazed, had to send Shirone off in the carriage without even a proper farewell.
Shirone remained calm inside the carriage.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Though he hadn't shown it to his parents, it was now more important to cool his head than to dwell on emotions.
Closing his eyes and entering the Spirit Zone, he sensed his parents wiping away tears as they waited for the departure.
Shirone gently touched their hearts with his thoughts.
A warm emotion seeped into Vincent and Olina's hearts.
It wasn't something you could call magic, but there was no doubt that Shirone's sincerity had reached them.
As the carriage jolted, Shirone was ejected from the Spirit Zone.
But his eyes remained closed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Entering the Ozent family was a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, but it could also become the worst crisis—a double-edged sword.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Can I survive two years among people with such overwhelming power?
Entrusting himself to an uncertain future, Shirone sank back into the Spirit Zone.
The Ozent family was a renowned martial house that had produced a nationally recognized 3rd-class swordsman at the general level.
Moreover, the family head, Ozent Bishop, was a nationally recognized 4th-class swordsman who served as the military commander of the Creaas city.
When Shirone arrived at the Ozent family, he was overwhelmed by the vast scenery beyond the main gate.
A massive road cut through the entire estate.
The road, which passed through the overwhelmingly large mansion, arched, and exited through the back gate, stretched far beyond what the eye could see.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So this is the Great Straight Road of the Ozent family, something I've only heard about.
The Great Straight Road, which divided the estate without hesitation, was a symbol of the Ozent family's bold temperament.
A common servant in his early twenties sneered at Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Common Servant
blocks.content: Hehe, scared already? No need to be surprised yet. The family members are even more monstrous.

blocks.speaker: Vincent
blocks.content: Watch your tongue. Do you want to lose your head?
An older servant cautioned him.
But since there was no real malice, he stopped scolding and led Shirone through the main gate.
The Great Straight Road wasn't for servants.
Shirone followed a garden path beside the road, circling around the mansion.
The servants' quarters were in a four-story circular building.
Upon entering the office, Deputy Butler Temuran was reviewing documents.

blocks.speaker: Temuran
blocks.content: You're here? I'll explain your tasks, so follow me.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes, I'll work hard.
Temuran didn't even acknowledge the greeting and headed straight to the library.
As the old iron library door creaked open, a space filled with books unfolded before them.
Books filled the second, third, and fourth floors—nothing but books.
Breathing in the scent of old paper, Shirone clenched his fist.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is more than worth risking my life for.

blocks.speaker: Temuran
blocks.content: We'll be moving these books to the new library. Your job is to categorize them.

blocks.speaker: Temuran
blocks.content: I'll send you a list every week, and you'll find and gather the books accordingly. Work hours are from 9 AM to 6 PM. After that, it's free time.

blocks.speaker: Temuran
blocks.content: You can't go outside, and you mustn't enter the mansion without special permission.

blocks.speaker: Temuran
blocks.content: The common servants will inform you of the house rules. Understood?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. When should I start?

blocks.speaker: Temuran
blocks.content: Tomorrow. Today, unpack and rest. Use the time to familiarize yourself with the house rules.
